button_click: Clean, simple click sound - crisp and responsive UI feedback. Short transient with no reverb tail. Similar to modern iOS/Android material design clicks. Triggered by generic button clicks throughout the UI.
start_game: Confirmation click combined with an uplifting startup tone. Conveys beginning and excitement. Medium-length sound with positive energy. Triggered when Start button is clicked on StartScreen to begin gameplay.
play_again: Positive click with a restart/refresh tone. Enthusiastic sound suggesting a fresh start. Upbeat and encouraging. Triggered when Play Again button is clicked on ResultsScreen after level complete.
main_menu: Neutral click with a back navigation tone. Softer than forward actions, suggests stepping back or returning. Clean and simple. Triggered when Main Menu button is clicked on ResultsScreen to return to start.
tile_rotate_1: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 1 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_2: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 2 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_3: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 3 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_4: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 4 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_5: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 5 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_6: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 6 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_7: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 7 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_8: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 8 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
level_complete: Triumphant fanfare/jingle celebrating victory. 3-part structure: intro hit, ascending melody, resolution. Uplifting and celebratory. Full range with emphasis on bright high frequencies. Similar to Mario level complete or Zelda puzzle solved. Duration: 1-2 seconds. Triggered when all landmarks are connected to exits and level objectives are completed.
landmark_connect: Melodic success chime with ascending tone. Achievement unlocked feel, connection made sound. Could use musical intervals (thirds, fifths). Warm and satisfying mid-range frequencies. Triggered when a landmark successfully connects to an exit via completed path.
chapter_complete: Grand celebratory fanfare for completing all 10 levels in a chapter. Bigger and more triumphant than level_complete - think 'world complete' in Mario. Full orchestral hit with brass and percussion. Duration: 2-3 seconds. Triggered when player finishes the final level of a chapter.
news_reveal: Dramatic reveal sound for news story interstitial. Newspaper unfold/typewriter aesthetic combined with 'breaking news' energy. Could include paper rustle, typewriter ding, or news jingle elements. Duration: 1-2 seconds. Triggered when showing the news story clue between levels or at chapter end.
dog_bark: Friendly, excited cartoon dog bark. Short and punchy, not aggressive. Happy and celebratory tone. For News Hound character reactions when landmarks connect or levels complete. Duration: 0.3-0.5 seconds.
dog_pant: Happy dog panting sound. Warm and endearing. Loopable for idle animations or loading states. Light breathing with occasional happy exhale. Duration: 2-3 seconds (loopable).
music_track_1: Upbeat jazzy background music. Smooth jazz meets puzzle game vibe - think light piano, soft brushed drums, walking bass. Cheerful and non-intrusive. Loopable with clean loop points. Duration: 60-90 seconds.
music_track_2: Mid-tempo jazz with slight urgency. Different instrumentation from track 1 - perhaps more prominent saxophone or vibraphone. Maintains puzzle-friendly energy without being distracting. Loopable. Duration: 60-90 seconds.
music_track_3: Relaxed, contemplative jazz. Slower pace suitable for later chapters when puzzles get harder. Mellow piano, soft strings, gentle rhythm section. Calming but engaging. Loopable. Duration: 60-90 seconds.
